category_sources: Official Invisible Island page says Vttest tests VT100-compatible terminals and adds VT220 through VT520/xterm tests.
source_facts.description says vttest tests compatibility of VT100-compatible terminals.
display_name_sources: Official Invisible Island page title uses VTTEST and text uses Vttest.
docs_sources: Official Invisible Island project page includes a Documentation section and links the vttest program manpage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Invisible Island page provides source downloads/archives but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official page mentions VT100, VT220 through VT520, and xterm tests.
source_facts.description identifies VT100 terminal compatibility testing.
